name: Mighty Nice Shrimp Cheese Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil; add shrimp and cook 3 to 5 minutes or until shrimp turn pink.
2. Drain well and rinse with cold water. Chill.
3. Peel, devein, and chop shrimp.
4. Combine shrimp, cream cheese, and the next four ingredients in a bowl. Stir well.
5. Cover and chill for 1 hour.
6. Shape the shrimp mixture into a ball; cover and chill thoroughly.
7. Combine chopped pecans and parsley; roll the cheese ball in the pecan mixture.
8. Serve with assorted crackers.
Yield: 1 (4-inch) cheese ball.
